form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At long odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Newbury on February 28 over 3300m, 36 len behind Princess Day with 65.5kg at $41. Last start 9th of 11 at Warwick on March 26 over 3200m, 33 len behind Saint Argente with 67.5kg at $41. Open to improvement so don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 13 over 1900m, 31 len behind Golden Muse with 60.5kg at $251. The start before that ran last of 9 at this track on February 23 over 1700m, 26 len behind Pendella carrying 64.5kg at $251. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 13 over 1900m, 31 len behind Golden Muse with 60.5kg at $251. The start before that ran last of 9 at this track on February 23 over 1700m, 26 len behind Pendella carrying 64.5kg at $251. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 23 over 1900m, 1.75 len behind Hard To Believe carrying 57kg at $3.30. Better for that outing and looks the testing material.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 23 over 1900m, 1.75 len behind Hard To Believe carrying 57kg at $3.30. Better for that outing and looks the testing material.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a eight months break. Not seen since he finished last of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather August 19 over 1600m, 35 len behind Allegresse carrying 59.5kg at $151. On debut ran last of 8 at Great Yarmouth July 28 over 1400m, 27 len behind Half Sovereign with 58kg at $29. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

formComments.title: TAB

On debut ran last of 8 at Great Yarmouth July 28 over 1400m, 27 len behind Half Sovereign with 58kg at $29. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when second last of 11 at Bath on October 30 over 1600m, on a slow track; 39 len behind Arc Ole Ole with 60.5kg at $67. Others are preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(11.5). Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when second last of 11 at Bath on October 30 over 1600m, on a slow track; 39 len behind Arc Ole Ole with 60.5kg at $67. Others are preferred.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 13 at Chelmsford November 26 over 1400m, 17 len behind Afraj with 58.5kg at $201. Previously first up; second last of 14 at Southwell All Weather October 24 over 1600m, 25 len behind Abundant with 59.5kg at $29. Hasn't shown enough.

formComments.title: TAB

Previously first up; second last of 14 at Southwell All Weather October 24 over 1600m, 25 len behind Abundant with 59.5kg at $29. Hasn't shown enough.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at Ripon September 27 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Bearin Up carrying 60.5kg at $2.30. On debut ran last of 9 at Ascot in the LR Chesham Stakes June 21 over 1400m, 13 len behind Humidity carrying 59.5kg at $67. Can get the job done.

formComments.title: TAB

On debut ran last of 9 at Ascot in the LR Chesham Stakes June 21 over 1400m, 13 len behind Humidity carrying 59.5kg at $67. Can get the job done.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 13 at Brighton October 7 over 1600m, 8 len behind A Taste Of Glory with 58kg at $251. On debut second last of 12 at Windsor July 26 over 1200m, 14 len behind Q T Pie carrying 58kg at $201. Returns in a winnable race.
